violations.description: General employee practices. — --Can of open soda on shelf in 3 door cooler in deli.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Wood pallets used for storage in bakery need to be painted or use a cleanable pallet.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside bottom of 3 door upright cooler in deli.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in Meat cutting room and in Deli walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors more thoroughly in all perishable departments.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles have cracks in meat dept. -Floor tiles peeling up in Starbucks
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in meat cutting room and in bakery walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need more thorough cleaning in produce, meat and bakery.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
